allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('TOP KEYS:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('has colors:', 'colors' in d\); print\('has specFields:', 'specFields' in d\); print\('has specifications:', 'specifications' in d\); print\('has selection:', 'selection' in d\); print\('has selectedVariant:', 'selectedVariant' in d\); print\('root images type:', type\(d.get\('images'\)\).__name__, len\(d.get\('images'\) or []\)\)")

PowerShell(npx eslint "app/product/[slug]/page.jsx" 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "set-state-in-effect|react-hooks|no-undef|is not defined|Parsing error" | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Line | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim\(\) })
